name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Court Orders Sheriff to Arrest Lisa
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=1)
---
Peter \--
## "Sheriff, I want you to take all reasonable, rational and safe methods to arrest Mrs Hanson. We need to move this case along."
[That's the statement](https://www.action4liberty.com/court_orders_sheriff_to_arrest_lisa_hanson?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=2) made by Third District Court Judge, Joseph Bueltel, this afternoon in an Order to Show Cause hearing for Freeborn County Sheriff, Kurt Freitag. Judge Bueltel issued a summons to appear in court today for the sheriff because he has not executed an arrest warrant for the owner of the Interchange Bistro in Albert Lea, Lisa Hanson. Freitag initially stood up for the rights of his constituent who has unlawfully been attacked by the Walz' Administration and local court system for, get this, opening up her restaurant in defiance of Governor Walz' illegal executive orders back in November of 2020. If you remember, Walz discriminately shut down part of Minnesota's economy last fall. He targeted gyms, restaurants and bars, while big box stores remained fully open and packed for the holiday season. Action 4 Liberty told the heroic stories of Larvita in Lynd, Jane in East Grand Forks and Lisa down in Albert Lea - business owners who defied the Governor's illegal orders and opened up. This courageous act was immediately punished by Dept of Health Commissioner Jan Malcolm's office with outrageous fines and revocation of liquor and food licenses. Attorney General Keith Ellison, representing the Dept of Health, got liberal judges across Minnesota to force these businesses to shut down and in some cases, found them in contempt of court. **Five months later, these business owners are still seeing the punitive nature of their government as they continue to have their licenses suspended and in the case of Lisa, an arrest warrant issued for her not showing up to a court hearing.** But it appears the court did not properly follow the rules in notifying Hanson of the court hearing, which is why she was not present. _Rules for thee, but not for me_! Things initially started looking good for Lisa's case when the county attorney argued that the Chief Justice of the Third District gave authority to sheriffs in quashing misdemeanor warrants. However, both the county and opposing council appeared to quickly resolve the case against the sheriff as long as Mrs Hanson is apprehended in the next two weeks and brought in front of the court. In other words, everyone in today's hearing was trying to save their own butts in the ugly and messy proceedings, while Lisa Hanson's freedoms became the sacrificial lamb. **Remember - this case would not be in front of the courts had the Third District Court or the Walz' Administration respected Lisa's rights in the first place.** Because Governor Walz' exercised unilateral, unchecked Emergency Powers to force businesses to close, Lisa is now facing the first arrest of her lifetime. And it's really sad that a small business owner, grandmother and patriot is now going to be placed in cuffs because in one year, our state has traded in its Republican form of government for the new normal of authoritarianism. Meanwhile, 20 minutes south of Lisa's hometown, businesses were fully open. **Do you see how serious this issue has become? Meanwhile in St Paul, Senate Majority Leader[Paul Gazelka](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UdUBanIu4fbXqYu4bSwW_eYo8iVfNQjFsUbqM2vjwm-Ojkn81yTCv7Yg2rFomxNXuzzuw2VAJNIoBt9p_cWShA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=3) is entering the final month of the legislative session and is on the cusp of signing a massive $52 Billion budget that fully funds Governor Walz' agencies.** Our state government is attacking the rights of our citizens and our Governor still is unilaterally creating laws. Why are we going about business as usual?! It's time for Gazelka to **grow a spine** and get serious about Ending Walz' Emergency Powers and passing the Never Again Bill. We couldn't count on him to FIRE JAN MALCOLM, but now he has a bigger bargaining chip.
## **No Deals. No compromise. And NO BUDGET until Emergency Powers are ended and the Never Again Bill is passed.**
He needs to deliver REAL PAIN to the Democrat Machine and STOP their funding. We owe it to Lisa and the millions of other Minnesotans who have had their liberties attacked by Governor Walz. We must ensure this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN. Please share this story with family and friends and on social media. Let's get this story out there!
## [SHARE THIS STORY](https://www.action4liberty.com/court_orders_sheriff_to_arrest_lisa_hanson?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=4)
**We'll be notifying you soon on the next step. In the meantime, please stay informed by visiting[action4liberty.com](https://www.action4liberty.com?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=5). **

**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=court_orders_sheriff&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: The Democrats couldn't STEAL this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
But this ISN'T going to stop them!! Peter,This is HUGE news!Mariannette Miller Meeks' Democrat opponent in Iowa's 2nd District just conceded the election. **_Of course, it took FIVE MONTHS of bitter fighting, lawsuits, liberal media smears, and Nancy Pelosi's best efforts to steal this election away from the REAL WINNER!_****[I'm proud to serve with Congresswoman Miller-Meeks, and I'm NOT going to sit and wait for the next election the Democrats try to STEAL!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-midctd-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [[ JOIN FITZGERALD ] - DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-midctd-ahkdjtlkr-y/) In Wisconsin, I helped pass strict Voter ID laws, election integrity laws, and cleaned up our broken state elections commission.Even after that, the 2020 election PROVED that the liberals are willing to break whatever laws they can get away with to steal our elections - _**and the last five months in Iowa's 2nd District proved it once again! **_I'm proud of my colleague Mariannette, and I'm going to keep FIGHTING to make sure Nancy Pelosi won't do the exact same thing to protect her power in 2022. [**Click here to support my work to CLEAN UP OUR ELECTIONS!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-midctd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-midctd-ahkdjtlkr-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-midctd-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

Will you help us reach it by donating now?** [**URGENT EOQ DONATION >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) Peter, our campaign is in high gear and we're already accomplishing huge things. Sarah is:
* Calling out the radical left in Washington for their socialist agenda
* Demanding President Biden be held accountable for his border failure
* Standing up for conservatives against the dangerous "cancel culture" of the left

And Peter, liberals are taking note. That's why they've made it their mission to attack Sarah every chance they get. **[FIGHT BACK>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r)** _But here 's the thing... These radicals might have the support of their allies in the media, but Sarah has the support of the people who matter: hard working Americans like you who make our country great. _ **And we know there 's nothing these politicians fear more than a leader who is willing to fight for freedom and the patriots who stand behind her. ** We're in this together, Peter, and that's why I wanted to reach out to you FIRST with the details of our VERY FIRST End of Quarter fundraising deadline. **At 11:59PM on March 31st we officially hit our first End of Quarter deadline of the campaign, and Peter - we 're going big. ** I'm setting a goal of 1,000 EOQ donors and I want you to be a part of it. Can you become an End of Quarter donor now? **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098007:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098008:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098009:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) [**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098010:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) **By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:** Peter, as governor, I will defend our American right to be free of socialism and tyranny, our Second Amendment right to keep our families safe, and our freedom of speech and religious liberty. _**I will not be intimidated by the serious challenges we face. I will lead with heart.**_ I will stand with our brave law enforcement officers, promote law and order, and keep our communities safe by eliminating sanctuary cities. I will fight back against the radical, socialist policies that threaten to destroy so many jobs and I will make the government accountable to the people. I want to see our nation reward hard work again and prosper -- to create a better future. [**SUPPORT SARAH FOR GOVERNOR NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) I stand up for my principles. And I don't back down. It's what my whole life has been about. Peter, I am a Christian. A wife. A mom. A proud Arkansan. My opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, but I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for. I am fighting for you...I will not retreat, I will not surrender, and I will not bow to the radical left. Not now. Not ever. I'll fight on the frontlines against the radical, socialist agenda. But I can't do it without you. That's why I want you on our side every step of the way. **Will you please help me meet my EOQ goal by chipping in today?:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2159031/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57098006:JDh5gzuNh:m:1:3206719985:D3679F37179BF013FC83E7C3BE547FE8:r) Sarah Huckabee Sanders |

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

body:
well, you know what they say about April showers...

NDTC-TLDR-Logo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMG9ydTJoOGpqM254aHQ2eGY0YWIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20venY3RjVJN0p3TC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNDAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

Peter — April is here and it is time to plant the seeds
of success for your campaign, career, or local organization.

We’re so excited to kick off a slate of trainings geared towards
building the hard skills and knowledge you need to bloom in
Democratic politics.

Click here to check out our full schedule of events or scroll
down to see what’s coming up next week!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMG9ydTJoOGpqM254aHQ2eGY0YWIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vUlAxb3ZJYThsNi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNDAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

And as always keep reading for more updates and resources!

— The NDTC Team

-----------------------------
Transgender Day of Visibility
-----------------------------

On Wednesday March 31, we marked Transgender Day of Visibility by
celebrating the trans community and drawing attention to the
discrimination and adversity the community still faces.

Despite recent progress, anti-LGBTQ activists have ushered in
over 80 pieces of anti-trans legislation in more than 25 states.

We stand in lockstep with the transgender community in support of
their efforts to push back against the hate fueled demonization
that endangers their lives.

If you’re looking for ways to help, head over to this article
from GLAAD to learn more on the current landscape of trans
visibility and for resources on being a better ally for the trans
community.
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMG9ydTJoOGpqM254aHQ2eGY0YWIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vU2R0SEVyVlhIUi9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNDAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

GO NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMG9ydTJoOGpqM254aHQ2eGY0YWIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vODdkendaS1d5WC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNDAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

And if you’re looking for a first person account on running for
office as a transgender person, you can view our interview with
Jessica Katzenmeyer
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiMG9ydTJoOGpqM254aHQ2eGY0YWIiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vNFRuYk5mVGEwTy9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNDAyMjFfdGxkclx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

We’re so excited to kick off a slate of trainings geared towards building the hard skills and knowledge you need to bloom in Democratic politics. Click here to check out our full schedule of events or scroll down to see what’s coming up next week! ( ) And as always keep reading for more updates and resources! — The NDTC Team Transgender Day of Visibility On Wednesday March 31, we marked Transgender Day of Visibility by celebrating the trans community and drawing attention to the discrimination and adversity the community still faces. Despite recent progress, anti-LGBTQ activists have ushered in over 80 pieces of anti-trans legislation in more than 25 states. We stand in lockstep with the transgender community in support of their efforts to push back against the hate fueled demonization that endangers their lives. If you’re looking for ways to help, head over to this article from GLAAD to learn more on the current landscape of trans visibility and for resources on being a better ally for the trans community. name: Breaking News
subject: This border crisis is just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Governors Association
body:
Someone needs to stop Biden before this gets worse

| | |
---

Under Joe Biden, southern states have become the doorway for illegal migrants Friend.

**Our entire country needs to be ready for the real consequences of Biden 's border crisis. **Your hard-earned money will be paying for free benefits for those who broke the law to come here.

[**We can 't wait around to find out how far Biden will go. We need patriots like you to stand with us to help secure our borders.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e9858_f0XvcW6LNT2LBwSs-wsZBX3TiR_rmP1yW56toOgKyxT_QqyIyArXLnDQBoR9L6xBkYNJt_dbvC5pEk9Y0lqZMVb4HDV33VAshW_ZsweW3VSUNvMdOa8usXpq9H-jaMeRuMEOp5IPRbse18OLmj42lpxhnK2iardGcFoigtEhpzK0cBTh1_f8C_LqDmPARfLgZ_tCBnEGT7iIij6fkRs7Bi4GiSeoZnnA0azjObpimbtOBcE6M8LTV1jjVh3uvF_XdPG1cmW20DEGDNH8SnwKbnxVt10bb4URJmQvfvnt7gp1nDU_c_fwfdb_nDIzgpVmNGrEyPn66xgmiTxBcruPJUB_pJwOsy-9TtSw7CvpZJgCldYQxoM11uW6_HfH3AHy-ryhHOoKXXB81nMF8TjgmXsmpv-MhVh9s8T4aD8i10wwZ0Ich6fueE7Df2px9myKa2F9s=&c=e7xwdG7R2IsHSueYQbiish86v7m6T5xHMaRDRvaP-nd_ZvSRxys_Xg==&ch=Zet4DDNitZRcS2LAZCirti9Atqs7VnU_bWmtEJRbaLeTtmHtrgPQkg==)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Did you see what happened to Tim Scott?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE**
body:
Democrats and the liberal media seem to think it's ok to attack those who don't think like them.

Friend,

Have you seen what a liberal MSNBC host said about my friend Senator Tim Scott?

Joy Reid said that Tim Scott provides only a _" patina"_, or the appearance, of diversity to the Republican Party. She has also called him a racial _" token"_ and _" prop"_ for the GOP because he is a conservative Black man.

**Her words disgust me, as they should every American.[Will you help Tim fight back against the liberal media trolls by chipping in today?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-fight-trolls/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210402_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1055046-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210402_did-you-see-what-happened-to-tim-scott/)**
[Fight For Tim >> Chip In](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-fight-trolls/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210402_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1055046-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210402_did-you-see-what-happened-to-tim-scott/)
---

Liberals can't grasp the fact that millions of minorities in this country refuse to be told how to think because of their race. So, they insult them, the same way they insulted my friend Tim Scott.

Tim Scott is a fantastic leader and role model who is doing a great job for South Carolina and for our country, and I am proud to stand with him.

**Joy Reid should apologize for her remarks, but more importantly, liberals must STOP using race to divide us.**

Democrats and the liberal media seem to think it's ok to attack those who don't think like them. And they'll continue to attack minority conservatives like me and Tim again and again if we don't take a stand.

[**Will you join me in chipping in to help Senator Tim Scott and hold these liberals accountable?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/nikki-fight-trolls/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210402_TY.100609_nikki-haley_t1055046-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210402_did-you-see-what-happened-to-tim-scott/)

---

My very best,

Nikki Haley

name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: This is how we stop the opioid epidemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rutledge for Governor
body:
Please take a moment to join me in calling for an end to opioid abuse
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019iI1sTilN0udTlh2700_olPqtt7R10cXznYIEMEDFBHoLHNUbK-Kk5NGdROj2a9WgdPFfNgISrxv7uAOiI4qvcD739MfUDwHQMpgtnATViaQ4iYagzprGGm-QWNc3Y3IPkRDScvydWZk6aX299qNa1Hz-yxKE6RY6wLoh1GHnCE1OupBa_NSIUoGjTPUVQUwLdtFeU693EUChXRfvxKorhb_sgrKqnK9ZqqcyVVJv0eJyj5DO-RAobcY7xJuv9UdHjZWpUwEoyQhrZYrc9Y92HW2tezuxeyaODwK_ATLVmXtOE4AX8DM7b6hI_uKgIQW8P05ejJSajKMIgFOhFLvjptCKU1D2Lmk7mcNP1l6tm3Gd2pr6ZYxaSvyIVLSXoXCtKcJf61gsV-cgTf2zFSHAfRw-jgTm_vXnc8-Vhz1pqgcwzvqKibp0McpWt31Yfiz&c=DkmcQ5tBhOD1W3Tv1lq5lMkMG-kiy679EkR6VZ0GshlYsGI6XzzZhw==&ch=dfXa9A6IANjtGlPkIRsiLpHeeXq1geHuXGk_KIvt78I8s6iDqmQm_Q==)
Friend,

Our country has been faced with an epidemic that claimed the lives of thousands and has destroyed communities across the country: the opioid crisis.

Corporations and big pharmaceutical companies have allowed opioids to ravage our entire nation. Now more than ever, Americans need to know that we have their back. That's why I filed a suit against Walgreens this week for failing to follow the law when it comes to reporting and preventing suspicious purchases of opioids.

[**Please take a moment to join me in calling for an end to opioid abuse >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019iI1sTilN0udTlh2700_olPqtt7R10cXznYIEMEDFBHoLHNUbK-Kk5NGdROj2a9WgdPFfNgISrxv7uAOiI4qvcD739MfUDwHQMpgtnATViaQ4iYagzprGGm-QWNc3Y3IPkRDScvydWZk6aX299qNa1Hz-yxKE6RY6wLoh1GHnCE1OupBa_NSIUoGjTPUVQUwLdtFeU693EUChXRfvxKorhb_sgrKqnK9ZqqcyVVJv0eJyj5DO-RAobcY7xJuv9UdHjZWpUwEoyQhrZYrc9Y92HW2tezuxeyaODwK_ATLVmXtOE4AX8DM7b6hI_uKgIQW8P05ejJSajKMIgFOhFLvjptCKU1D2Lmk7mcNP1l6tm3Gd2pr6ZYxaSvyIVLSXoXCtKcJf61gsV-cgTf2zFSHAfRw-jgTm_vXnc8-Vhz1pqgcwzvqKibp0McpWt31Yfiz&c=DkmcQ5tBhOD1W3Tv1lq5lMkMG-kiy679EkR6VZ0GshlYsGI6XzzZhw==&ch=dfXa9A6IANjtGlPkIRsiLpHeeXq1geHuXGk_KIvt78I8s6iDqmQm_Q==)

As Arkansas' Attorney General, I have done everything I could to combat the opioid epidemic in our state. I even launched a first-in-the-nation initiative that tackled opioid abuse by offering a free education program called Prescription for Life to every high school student in the state. And as governor, I will continue to fight this epidemic and heal the wounds it has caused in our communities.

[**If you 're with me, join the fight against the opioid epidemic by adding your name to our petition TODAY>>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019iI1sTilN0udTlh2700_olPqtt7R10cXznYIEMEDFBHoLHNUbK-Kk5NGdROj2a9WgdPFfNgISrxv7uAOiI4qvcD739MfUDwHQMpgtnATViaQ4iYagzprGGm-QWNc3Y3IPkRDScvydWZk6aX299qNa1Hz-yxKE6RY6wLoh1GHnCE1OupBa_NSIUoGjTPUVQUwLdtFeU693EUChXRfvxKorhb_sgrKqnK9ZqqcyVVJv0eJyj5DO-RAobcY7xJuv9UdHjZWpUwEoyQhrZYrc9Y92HW2tezuxeyaODwK_ATLVmXtOE4AX8DM7b6hI_uKgIQW8P05ejJSajKMIgFOhFLvjptCKU1D2Lmk7mcNP1l6tm3Gd2pr6ZYxaSvyIVLSXoXCtKcJf61gsV-cgTf2zFSHAfRw-jgTm_vXnc8-Vhz1pqgcwzvqKibp0McpWt31Yfiz&c=DkmcQ5tBhOD1W3Tv1lq5lMkMG-kiy679EkR6VZ0GshlYsGI6XzzZhw==&ch=dfXa9A6IANjtGlPkIRsiLpHeeXq1geHuXGk_KIvt78I8s6iDqmQm_Q==)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X_vARUmO6pjWmJhWYpkRaoMsyi8MSnSlbVgg_oXfK1x8yI3se8g3O1-UVtDgNMiBqj3Rrzf0GAzno6PSqC-5iBSQTFxTsFmIobTFeD1i1PxCAmGQ4-kLBwl5AJqJREuUAOnogEyi9LI=&c=x27qTqoiJvp0TqO8SHGt4BNJcqukNPXDmh28uJj4L7HEjLoJQNjEiA==&ch=2iyg9RcTC9W1t1zH9wQ4VZVM1gw06jcVxtaZpBPJ_fjiKrK6TODVXw==).

subject: What Joe Biden said is pathetic. Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ensuring our elections are fair and secure is good for Americans of ALL AMERICANS and ensures our democracy stays fair and free.

**
Biden: Georgia law is
'Jim Crow in the 21st century' \- _The Hill_**

Patriot,

Joe Biden thinks new laws in Georgia requiring voters to show ID are **racist**.

That's right: Joe Biden and the Democrats keep comparing voter ID laws to Jim Crow, and it's **pathetic.**

Growing up in the segregated South, I experienced real racism first hand...so when I heard the Left's new talking point, I couldn't let it go unchallenged. But to make the biggest impact I need you to join me.

[**I know how important election integrity is to patriots like you, so I am asking you to stand with me and sign our Election Integrity Petition today and DEMAND voter ID at the ballot box.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016O0NIH2KBFEmJrcD88yhklXc9GPjCXHW0LDYMMkP00c8upU4fUpfl3eq6WSFPMixqg_2H80iWOOeNPFaABypcv4AFHOh37kBlnJ72NGT8K2AMneOkPbdH9rxfvfkuwCeM3hPJzMqNybXLWay0Xymc3937OUd1CTeVrHtaNX3MxqRPK8r3cvMfX7meHen8ndG4_BirlInrJov6sYAiaIN89uszrwF_oGZsSnbXb3lUYery4BQOYiLXNnulDpk97c-lkUlRml2B8DH7J7kg2jogPZTN09Ha1z1fpoVD6VwHwG68mxS9Cau9ZoeRoGMDu2ZoiccP2yjswIStU0FO3oZfimS5XpPdamm3z9mCgyDc4XN080aSUBchQRj0jUbzVGa8Mp5xXE5BDn3j8St2jkkLIimXlfPOFb1Hcy1uGKE5HZqOgHn4fAIA9_aUuVEbuBN&c=zn2O5CIfyignIOmeJ2Eemig2VYVWAzJuJMQWiqol6mWxdjLc3HZ4pg==&ch=mDblpPQtGdKt13kmoFIxpWxiaTQwaHHP7Gg1HvCY5E9bZsSaxc4ZHw==)

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016O0NIH2KBFEmJrcD88yhklXc9GPjCXHW0LDYMMkP00c8upU4fUpfl3eq6WSFPMixqg_2H80iWOOeNPFaABypcv4AFHOh37kBlnJ72NGT8K2AMneOkPbdH9rxfvfkuwCeM3hPJzMqNybXLWay0Xymc3937OUd1CTeVrHtaNX3MxqRPK8r3cvMfX7meHen8ndG4_BirlInrJov6sYAiaIN89uszrwF_oGZsSnbXb3lUYery4BQOYiLXNnulDpk97c-lkUlRml2B8DH7J7kg2jogPZTN09Ha1z1fpoVD6VwHwG68mxS9Cau9ZoeRoGMDu2ZoiccP2yjswIStU0FO3oZfimS5XpPdamm3z9mCgyDc4XN080aSUBchQRj0jUbzVGa8Mp5xXE5BDn3j8St2jkkLIimXlfPOFb1Hcy1uGKE5HZqOgHn4fAIA9_aUuVEbuBN&c=zn2O5CIfyignIOmeJ2Eemig2VYVWAzJuJMQWiqol6mWxdjLc3HZ4pg==&ch=mDblpPQtGdKt13kmoFIxpWxiaTQwaHHP7Gg1HvCY5E9bZsSaxc4ZHw==)**
**
** **
While Joe Biden was praising and making friends with segregationists in the Senate, I saw the evils of white supremacy with my own eyes. **THESE NEW LAWS ARE NO Jim Crow 2.0.** Ensuring our elections are fair and secure is good for ALL AMERICANS and ensures our democracy stays fair and free.**

**
**[**STAND WITH BURGESS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016O0NIH2KBFEmJrcD88yhklXc9GPjCXHW0LDYMMkP00c8upU4fUpfl3eq6WSFPMixqg_2H80iWOOeNPFaABypcv4AFHOh37kBlnJ72NGT8K2AMneOkPbdH9rxfvfkuwCeM3hPJzMqNybXLWay0Xymc3937OUd1CTeVrHtaNX3MxqRPK8r3cvMfX7meHen8ndG4_BirlInrJov6sYAiaIN89uszrwF_oGZsSnbXb3lUYery4BQOYiLXNnulDpk97c-lkUlRml2B8DH7J7kg2jogPZTN09Ha1z1fpoVD6VwHwG68mxS9Cau9ZoeRoGMDu2ZoiccP2yjswIStU0FO3oZfimS5XpPdamm3z9mCgyDc4XN080aSUBchQRj0jUbzVGa8Mp5xXE5BDn3j8St2jkkLIimXlfPOFb1Hcy1uGKE5HZqOgHn4fAIA9_aUuVEbuBN&c=zn2O5CIfyignIOmeJ2Eemig2VYVWAzJuJMQWiqol6mWxdjLc3HZ4pg==&ch=mDblpPQtGdKt13kmoFIxpWxiaTQwaHHP7Gg1HvCY5E9bZsSaxc4ZHw==)
**

****Let me be clear: the real racism is thinking only white people are capable of getting an ID.** **As a proud Black conservative, I won't let them bully us with their phony accusations of racism. [**Please, join me and stand for REAL Election Integrity.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016O0NIH2KBFEmJrcD88yhklXc9GPjCXHW0LDYMMkP00c8upU4fUpfl3eq6WSFPMixqg_2H80iWOOeNPFaABypcv4AFHOh37kBlnJ72NGT8K2AMneOkPbdH9rxfvfkuwCeM3hPJzMqNybXLWay0Xymc3937OUd1CTeVrHtaNX3MxqRPK8r3cvMfX7meHen8ndG4_BirlInrJov6sYAiaIN89uszrwF_oGZsSnbXb3lUYery4BQOYiLXNnulDpk97c-lkUlRml2B8DH7J7kg2jogPZTN09Ha1z1fpoVD6VwHwG68mxS9Cau9ZoeRoGMDu2ZoiccP2yjswIStU0FO3oZfimS5XpPdamm3z9mCgyDc4XN080aSUBchQRj0jUbzVGa8Mp5xXE5BDn3j8St2jkkLIimXlfPOFb1Hcy1uGKE5HZqOgHn4fAIA9_aUuVEbuBN&c=zn2O5CIfyignIOmeJ2Eemig2VYVWAzJuJMQWiqol6mWxdjLc3HZ4pg==&ch=mDblpPQtGdKt13kmoFIxpWxiaTQwaHHP7Gg1HvCY5E9bZsSaxc4ZHw==)**
**
Thank you,

Burgess Owens

Congressman, UT-04**
******

Friend, I know my team, myself, and even my wife have been emailing you about our critical end of quarter fundraising goal. But here's the thing: **It 's April 2nd and we still haven't reached it. ** I'm a true Trump Republican, and I'm fighting every single day to defend the conservative principles we hold dear -- but if I can't reach this fundraising goal, then it will be all for not. body:
Democrats are easing the laws regarding abortion not only in the United States but around the globe.

With such a hectic political climate, it is easy to forget about the important issues we as Republicans support.

body:
We can't do this without you. | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=ac0697a5e2&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
I know we’ve emailed you a lot lately, but I wanted to take a quick second to say thank you.

**_Thanks to generous supporters like YOU, we reached our End of Quarter goal!_**

Because of your investment and constant support, we’re reaching more people than ever before with our message of conservative results and Kansas common sense.

**_Because of you, we’re making a difference in the U.S. Senate, for Kansans and for all Americans._**

You have my word — I will NEVER back down to the woke left and I will always defend life, our jobs, and our way of life. But I can’t do this without you, and I’m so grateful to have you on Team Marshall.

We’ll be in touch with more ways you can help us take back our country soon, but today I just wanted to say thank you.

Senator Roger Marshall

P.S. — If you missed the deadline, it’s not too late to give! [**Click here to chip in $20.22.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=4160d11850&e=0b94e583bc)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
body:
-October 30, 2020-

-FOUR days until the election-

There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot.

Do you know how you’re voting this year?

Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [https://www.indems.org/find-out-whos-on-your-ballot/] .

Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [https://www.indems.org/how-to-vote-in-2020/] .

Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot?

We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [https://www.indems.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/countyclerkoffices2020.pdf] by noon on election day, Nov. 3.

If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [https://www.indems.org/mailin-fix/] for more information.

Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org .

GOTV Phone Banking [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Election%20Night%20Live.%20Email%20%283%29.png]

Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking.
Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party!
All times in EDT.

-Our 2020 election night live stream-

Election Night Live! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/1_30.png]

Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems!

Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot!

You can join us on Facebook Live [https://www.facebook.com/116924065002990/posts/3860255990669760/] or YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WwGVVHxm1ls] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3.

clean_body: -October 30, 2020- -FOUR days until the election- There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot. Do you know how you’re voting this year? Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [] . Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [] . Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot? We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [] by noon on election day, Nov. 3. If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [] for more information. Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org . GOTV Phone Banking [] Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking. Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party! All times in EDT. SATURDAY, Oct. 31 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] SUNDAY, Nov. 1 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] MONDAY, Nov. 2 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] TUESDAY, Nov. 2 9 AM - 12 PM [] 12 PM - 3 PM [] 3 PM - 6 PM [] -Our 2020 election night live stream- Election Night Live! [] Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems! Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot! You can join us on Facebook Live [] or YouTube [] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3. -2020 Resources- The 2020 Voter Guide [] - everything you need to know to vote this year Find your early vote location here [] Find out who is running in your district here [] . Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Hamilton County Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Lake County Voter protection line: call 317-261-3820 for help with registration, voting by mail, or voter suppression. Voting help email: voting@indems.org for general voting questions. Check out our list of ways to get involved [] this year. Check out our event list here [] or see the bottom of this email for events happening soon! -Resources for campaigns- The 2020 Candidate Toolbox is equipped with voter education content, campaign tips, Indiana stats, and other digital content for Hoosier Dems running for office in 2020. Email zking@indems.org for access. We've added new webinars [] to help candidates adjust to campaigning during a public health crisis. Check them out today! -Other Resources- Sign our petition to stand up for Black Hoosiers here [] . Read our blog post on how to be an ally to Black and brown communities here [] . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? name: John Burke
subject: California is dead last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
This is not the news we were hoping for. Read more >>
Peter, California used to lead in education. From kindergarten through our nationally renowned public universities, we really had something to be proud about. Now that’s all changed. Under Gavin Newsom, California is dead last in school reopenings. Our children deserve so much better than this! Schools in many parts of America have been open safely since last fall, but Gavin Newsom and the teachers unions refuse to follow the science and data. Now that the Recall Newsom petition has been submitted with over 2 million signatures, Gavin has tried to proclaim that he’s “opening” schools, but that’s far from the truth. Partial reopenings aren't going to cut it. **Kevin Faulconer knows how important education is to our children, and he won’t rest until every student is able to return to school FULL TIME.** If you know a family that is struggling with schooling in California right now, please forward this email to them. They’re not alone. Kevin Faulconer and our whole team are working on fixing it. Thanks for your support,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c0e424474d945a1/4da63898282c4b31c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c0e424474d945a1/1c0b6650bbb48f27c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c0e424474d945a1/7c7a302af14166d7c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT REGARDING MLB'S ALL-STAR GAME DECISION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, APRIL 2, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT REGARDING MLB'S ALL-STAR GAME DECISION
ATLANTA - In response to the MLB's decision to [relocate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xzb58kcJYYnHVBWDg6N8ObVvxpBx3ybtpdcUyw5baH6uEOoo4DxJAD4_Rlkfhesxp1D_njUaSmu3_DhT1TI6wFEdd6WWSlieYbUUJjXwy7g3Dy40zfwh0ruEkN1GSatMZd68sZ-8iymWVYI8e7byzyZqOfRhGU1RNxZGEUME0n_xM3zrARiKIkrlENrDnUumTF5VNB0f2bXrmoCz1qKVkOSQNK3Tv6x9&c=j32tyC0Zpm1M-PLFcJ7a0ENlqkd0l4qI6Xq87Y8BtMzlOXwN3BYrLA==&ch=fO5-bzHUEciQYpxj_eY0XzTeTrerJsilMJoOYZyFcXfJ5XH_SAG1UQ==) the All-Star Game and MLB Draft from Atlanta, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler released the following statement:
"It's extremely unfortunate that the MLB has fallen into the woke, misinformation campaign being spread by Democrats - only to the detriment of hardworking Georgians and small businesses. At a time when the MLB had the opportunity to honor an iconic trailblazer in Hank Aaron, they instead opted to honor politics," Kelly Loeffler said.
"Greater Georgia will continue to stand with the vast majority of Georgians who support the Election Integrity Act that expands access and strengthens the integrity of our elections."
---
| ###

name: Candace Owens
subject: Show me your papers, Comrade
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103182:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| Joe Biden wants you and me to carry around a **VACCINE PASSPORT** ... so we can "prove" our medical history whenever a business or government official demands it.To say this is unconstitutional is an understatement. **It 's _un-American._** This much is clear: no one's going to _give_ us our freedoms back. **We have to TAKE them back**.**[Will you help me lead this fight... by pitching in just $25 to support me and my work?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103183:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r "Will you help me lead this fight... by pitching in just $25 to support me and my
work?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103182:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| For a year, our government has destroyed our economy, punished small businesses, denied our children an education, and alienated us from family and friends.Now,**they 're pressuring us to take a rushed, experimental vaccine.**And if you don't comply? **Joe Biden will ban you**... from the grocery store, from traveling to see your family, from going to restaurants and schools... _until you capitulate._**This pandemic was never about keeping us safe.** This was about the far-Left grabbing more power than ever before... and gutting our basic freedoms and dignity as human beings.
They won't stop unless we make them stop, Peter. **[Pitch in $25 or more right away, and let's put the COVID tyrants back in their place.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103183:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r "Pitch in $25 or
more right away, and let’s put the COVID tyrants back in their place.")**
---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103184:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103182:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103183:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| | | [DONATE WHAT YOU CAN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57103182:6FsXmnuMN:m:1:3206719985:FA1C31254DB10A39B680FFEFCB2AACA3:r)
---
| For Freedom,

Candace Owens
---

## This week in Washington..
---
| It's been a busy week in Washington, Georgia passed new election laws, there's a crisis at the southern border, and the media continues to contradict itself at every turn. Check out our coverage of some of these stories from Spicer & Co.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: ICYMI: Banned and in a bind . . .
body:
This week, I got an email from Stripe, my donation payment processor . . . and they banned me.
| | | | Friend,

[](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419810-985825-5513652-a7952b30f9-4b23505944) This week, I got an email from Stripe, my donation payment processor . . . and they banned me.

If you recall, Stripe also recently banned President Donald Trump.

Stripe is giving me just a few weeks before they shut down my account.

So now I’m in a scramble to find another provider, transition data, and update my site.

[**Can you please chip in $20 before they kill my account for good?**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419810-985825-5513652-a7952b30f9-4b23505944)

Now, I’m banned by Paypal, Venmo, GoFundMe, CashApp and Stripe and it’s a clear attempt to cut off my sources of revenue so I’m forced to find a new profession . . . but that’s NOT happening!

[**Help me transition with a $20 gift today.**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419810-985825-5513652-a7952b30f9-4b23505944)

It’s no coincidence that I was banned by Stripe immediately following my testimony at the Florida State Capitol where I SPECIFICALLY briefed lawmakers and asked them to include financial institutions and payment processors in their proposed legislation to stop Cancel Culture.

While Big Tech thinks I’ll give up and go away, all these bans do is give me more focus and more evidence to push for effective change to stop discrimination against conservatives.

But for now, I have to find a way to keep going, so please, if you’re able, [**help me out with a donation of whatever you can afford**](https://em.loomered.com/ga/click/2-587068045-4281-419810-985825-5513652-a7952b30f9-4b23505944).

I’ll be back up and running soon, but it’s going to cost me a few thousand dollars to move everything over.

If you can help out in anyway, I would really appreciate it.

Thanks so much.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: I wanted to get this out of the way now. | Friend, I don’t want to bother you over the Easter weekend, so I decided to reach out to you today. Tuesday, April 6, is the spring election here in Wisconsin -- and our first opportunity to chip away at Governor Tony Evers’ stranglehold on the state and get our lives back to normal. With your support, we can elect conservatives for: ✅Wisconsin Department of Public Instruction Superintendent✅Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judges✅School board members✅Local government officials Our fundraising will pause over the Easter weekend, so when we start back up on Monday, we will only have 24 HOURS LEFT to raise our final funds to get our candidates elected. That’s why I hope you’ll be able to make a contribution today to ensure we don’t fall behind. Our slate of candidates running in Tuesday’s elections will make you proud, Friend. We scoured the state for hardworking conservatives bold enough to take on the liberal establishment. And I can confidently tell you that the candidates we are investing in have real prospects to win. Among them are: • A retired nurse who is using her medical expertise to fight for the safe way to get kids back in class...• A mom of an autistic 13-year-old who has tried to virtually school him and her other student in between assisting hundreds more families coming to the food and diaper bank she runs...• A fed-up dad who is also a cop, fighting for freedom from partisan agendas inside kids’ classrooms... With your support today, we can elect these everyday leaders and ensure that conservatives have a stronger voice in local government. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

Note from Chairman Stepanek
Derek,

**Thank you to all who supported our Virtual Fundraiser with the Honorable Mike Pompeo this past week. Through your support, we were able to reach our goal, and were able to raise over six thousand dollars! This funding will be of incredible help to ensure the election of Bill Boyd in his upcoming special election in Merrimack. **

**On that note, I would like to extend an invitation for an upcoming event supporting Bill Boyd on Monday, April 5th. The New Hampshire GOP is hosting a free[Facebook live event](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S-2BXkeFWUEjC-2BrYHgPwRIr-2B7Q5c8yHzKdV2oYNvCTHTt3qFua_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HVd-2FTq2RysUwEija1jtKpY8Hw9V9G2QUwaYz-2FHI-2FLAJWv7kx1t6nW84u3qdzEiN0f2kEoA59e-2FAZ0Of4ZxHkQMDQQnoUEAWfpI2qr6ddp-2BzlG7Q-2BpRNAedOAdgyJWyQpu-2BG9qZEBv5WdUGNzwR1LQxkGgKqTeIkqkiQ7ciFK4rkIiUk3YuYffghbwF9KmkiuIGrcF5ALfLPSJ8SJ6QdSuHfPKUfC5OOcAAhthIpaeLZDqg9Mbf78HcUD86kQOTUO7tfOGr1Z1IhWfqSkRpKHcSQ-3D-3D) with special guests Matt Mowers, Senator Tom Cotton, and Senator Kelly Ayotte. We look forward to supporting Bill and uplifting conservative voices across the state of New Hampshire. Hope you can tune in on our Facebook page Monday night!**

**Lastly, I urge everyone to continue raising awareness to the Democrat pushed S.1 bill (H.R.1) and the imminent danger it imposes on the Granite State. This bill looks to take away our ‘First in the Nation’ primary status, a political tradition that has been a cherished part of New Hampshire history for over a century. Our Secretary of State Bill Gardner, a Democrat who has served our state dutifully for 23 terms, has confirmed this to be a fact. It’s very clear that this legislation is a threat to ALL New Hampshire residents, and by no means a partisan issue. The bottom line is that while Democrat officials in DC are attempting to mask this bill as a positive move for voter expansion, they’re chipping away at the base of our Granite State’s election system.**

**In response, we’ve launched a new[petition](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqXmue7AR3L4jvp8cXZznW0lJpXucMOFTRnsZ-2FsJJWXaY-3D31l0_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HVd-2FTq2RysUwEija1jtKpY8Hw9V9G2QUwaYz-2FHI-2FLAJWv7kx1t6nW84u3qdzEiN0f2kEoA59e-2FAZ0Of4ZxHkQMG2NmibDzcXNeFPQQX2dgyTEVW0XSHetaKoFTgUNC1ErqdrAGm5dtfblPprI2Df6Q7G2ett0mWmioDH8jdwLZcxnlMFZauHaLEcm6rtrO-2Fj8utC0C7iABlIouqj2g683dHQJupy0uj4Rz08S5AxrV8HaFEoHMfufBXZmc8dGjMNAUcRNb4DqrJxNqn-2BesipaKA-3D-3D) to Defend our First-in-the-Nation Primary, and I ask you to sign and share the petition with your networks. We need our Federal delegates to know how deeply we oppose this bill, and that we refuse to allow D.C legislators to take control over New Hampshire’s governing abilities and traditions. Please be sure to reach out to Senator Shaheen, and Senator Hassan to relay your concerns. **

**As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org!**

**Sincerely,**
**Stephen Stepanek**
**NHGOP Chairman**

Senate Update from Senate President Morse
_**Vaccine Passports Have no Home in New Hampshire **_

This week, New Hampshire opened up COVID vaccine availability to everyone resident age 16 and up, well ahead of our neighboring states. But the Biden Administration is considering the creation of COVID-19 "vaccine passports". Many Granite Staters have since reached out to me understandably disturbed by these reports.

I want to make it clear that I will not support the creation of any "vaccine passport" in New Hampshire that would limit the ability of New Hampshire residents to travel, work or enter businesses based on vaccination status.

This type of restriction can only further harm the already ailing small businesses here in New Hampshire. We have worked tirelessly in the New Hampshire legislature this year to remove the onerous regulations and other barriers to full economic recovery and creating new restrictions that would limit the ability of potential customers to enter a business, or tourists to travel to our state, is not the way to rebound.

**Sen. Chuck Morse**
Follow our State House Accounts:

_**Republican Spotlight: Meet Joseph Gagnon **_
This week’s Republican spotlight is focused on Joseph Gagnon, who was recently elected to the Budget Committee of Londonderry NH. He started his official political career in June of 2020 by volunteering for the local Londonderry Republican committee, but has held a passion for New Hampshire politics from a young age. In highschool, Joe was an active member of his student council, and attended an annual state-wide leadership conference for students. In July of 2020 he worked for the Matt Mowers Congressional Campaign before becoming a field organizer for the Trump Victory team.

After November 3rd he helped recruit volunteer lawyers for the Trump Campaign in Philadelphia before traveling to Georgia as a field organizer for the RNC special elections. He has since returned home to Londonderry where he was elected Secretary of the Londonderry Republican Committee and is currently a member of the Republican State Committee.

Thank you so much Joseph Gagnon for the work you have done for our Republican party. You are a rising star in New Hampshire Politics, and we are very excited to see what the future holds. We cannot wait to see what your achievements will be, and what your strong leadership will bring in the future.

**Concord, NH –** House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) and House Labor, Industrial and Rehabilitative Services Chairman Will Infantine (R-Manchester) released the following statements following the hearing on SB61, prohibiting collective bargaining agreements that require employees to join a labor union:

**Majority Leader Osborne: **
“This is about giving Granite Staters the freedom they deserve in addition to the clear economic benefits of passing this bill. Workers should not be coerced into paying union dues just to hold a job. Three years ago the Supreme Court decided that public sector employees cannot be forced to pay union dues as part of their employment and workers in private industry should be afforded the same opportunity. Despite what the opponents of this bill say, it does nothing to affect an individual’s ability to join or form a union, it simply allows them to make a decision on whether or not membership is worth their hard earned money.”

**Chairman Will Infantine:**
“New Hampshire has a golden opportunity to jump-start its economic growth by becoming New England’s only Right-to-Work state. If the 27 Right-to-Work states nationwide have proven anything it’s that passing this legislation will result in more jobs, better wages, and more freedom for New Hampshire’s workforce.”

** **
**The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women is so excited to announce that we are starting another club! This will be our second new club this year. Support for our current clubs along with new club development is crucial to being organized for our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts! **

**The Lakes Region FRW is having their organizational meeting on April 20 at 7pm to elect their Executive Officers and approve their Bylaws. They need 10 female members to join for $35 as founding members to start their club! The Lakes Region FRW will aim to represent women in any town in the "lakes region" of NH and will be based in Belknap County. **

clean_body: | | secure.nh.gop secure.nh.gop mailto:info@nhgop.org?subject=re:%20Newsletter&body= Today's Newsletter Highlights | Chairman's Note Weekly Glance at Governor Chris Sununu Senate Update from Senator Chuck Morse Upcoming Events Republican Spotlight: Joseph Gagnon House Republican Update NHFRW Update NHGOP Tweets | Note from Chairman Stepanek Derek, Thank you to all who supported our Virtual Fundraiser with the Honorable Mike Pompeo this past week. Through your support, we were able to reach our goal, and were able to raise over six thousand dollars! This funding will be of incredible help to ensure the election of Bill Boyd in his upcoming special election in Merrimack. On that note, I would like to extend an invitation for an upcoming event supporting Bill Boyd on Monday, April 5th. The New Hampshire GOP is hosting a free with special guests Matt Mowers, Senator Tom Cotton, and Senator Kelly Ayotte. We look forward to supporting Bill and uplifting conservative voices across the state of New Hampshire. Hope you can tune in on our Facebook page Monday night! Lastly, I urge everyone to continue raising awareness to the Democrat pushed S.1 bill (H.R.1) and the imminent danger it imposes on the Granite State. This bill looks to take away our ‘First in the Nation’ primary status, a political tradition that has been a cherished part of New Hampshire history for over a century. Our Secretary of State Bill Gardner, a Democrat who has served our state dutifully for 23 terms, has confirmed this to be a fact. It’s very clear that this legislation is a threat to ALL New Hampshire residents, and by no means a partisan issue. The bottom line is that while Democrat officials in DC are attempting to mask this bill as a positive move for voter expansion, they’re chipping away at the base of our Granite State’s election system. In response, we’ve launched a new to Defend our First-in-the-Nation Primary, and I ask you to sign and share the petition with your networks. We need our Federal delegates to know how deeply we oppose this bill, and that we refuse to allow D.C legislators to take control over New Hampshire’s governing abilities and traditions. Please be sure to reach out to Senator Shaheen, and Senator Hassan to relay your concerns. As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org! Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | Weekly Governor's Glance: To learn more about the Governor's efforts, click the link to his website below | | Senate Update from Senate President Morse Vaccine Passports Have no Home in New Hampshire This week, New Hampshire opened up COVID vaccine availability to everyone resident age 16 and up, well ahead of our neighboring states. But the Biden Administration is considering the creation of COVID-19 "vaccine passports". Many Granite Staters have since reached out to me understandably disturbed by these reports. I want to make it clear that I will not support the creation of any "vaccine passport" in New Hampshire that would limit the ability of New Hampshire residents to travel, work or enter businesses based on vaccination status. This type of restriction can only further harm the already ailing small businesses here in New Hampshire. We have worked tirelessly in the New Hampshire legislature this year to remove the onerous regulations and other barriers to full economic recovery and creating new restrictions that would limit the ability of potential customers to enter a business, or tourists to travel to our state, is not the way to rebound. Sen. Chuck Morse Follow our State House Accounts: | | Upcoming Events | Join the New Hampshire GOP with special guests, Senator Tom Cotton & Senator Kelly Ayotte | The New Hampshire Republican Party is proud to host this FREE, Facebook live event in support of candidate Bill Boyd. Senators Tom Cotton & Kelly Ayotte will be joining us to discuss the importance of our upcoming special election in Merrimack, as well as to empower conservative voices across the Granite State. To receive updates on the event, make sure to RSVP to the event page - link below! In July of 2020 he worked for the Matt Mowers Congressional Campaign before becoming a field organizer for the Trump Victory team. After November 3rd he helped recruit volunteer lawyers for the Trump Campaign in Philadelphia before traveling to Georgia as a field organizer for the RNC special elections. He has since returned home to Londonderry where he was elected Secretary of the Londonderry Republican Committee and is currently a member of the Republican State Committee. Thank you so much Joseph Gagnon for the work you have done for our Republican party. You are a rising star in New Hampshire Politics, and we are very excited to see what the future holds. We cannot wait to see what your achievements will be, and what your strong leadership will bring in the future. NH Republican House Update: Concord, NH – House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) and House Labor, Industrial and Rehabilitative Services Chairman Will Infantine (R-Manchester) released the following statements following the hearing on SB61, prohibiting collective bargaining agreements that require employees to join a labor union: Majority Leader Osborne: “This is about giving Granite Staters the freedom they deserve in addition to the clear economic benefits of passing this bill. Workers should not be coerced into paying union dues just to hold a job. Three years ago the Supreme Court decided that public sector employees cannot be forced to pay union dues as part of their employment and workers in private industry should be afforded the same opportunity. Despite what the opponents of this bill say, it does nothing to affect an individual’s ability to join or form a union, it simply allows them to make a decision on whether or not membership is worth their hard earned money.” Chairman Will Infantine: “New Hampshire has a golden opportunity to jump-start its economic growth by becoming New England’s only Right-to-Work state. If the 27 Right-to-Work states nationwide have proven anything it’s that passing this legislation will result in more jobs, better wages, and more freedom for New Hampshire’s workforce.” | NHFRW is founding a new 'Lakes Region' Club! | The New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women is so excited to announce that we are starting another club! This will be our second new club this year. Support for our current clubs along with new club development is crucial to being organized for our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts! The Lakes Region FRW is having their organizational meeting on April 20 at 7pm to elect their Executive Officers and approve their Bylaws. They need 10 female members to join for $35 as founding members to start their club! The Lakes Region FRW will aim to represent women in any town in the "lakes region" of NH and will be based in Belknap County. | NHGOP Tweets: | | | | ---|---|--- | | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Arkansas just banned health care for trans youth — We need the Equality Act now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This monumental bill would update federal civil rights protections and the Senate has the chance to pass it now.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210402-1990-header&t=1&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)
Transgender people, specifically trans kids, are under attack in state legislatures across the country. In fact, Arkansas just became the first state to ban necessary health care from trans youth.
HB 1570 prohibits doctors from providing gender-affirming medical care to trans kids. The bill is currently sitting on Governor Hutchinson’s desk awaiting signature.
28 states are voting on anti-trans legislation this year. **This is an abhorrent attack on the trans community, and a clear sign that federal legislation is needed to protect the LGBTQIA+ community as a whole.**
The Senate is currently sitting on a piece of legislation that would do just that — the Equality Act. It successfully passed through the House in February, and now it's up to us to ensure our Senators do the right thing and pass the Equality Act now.
[If you agree we must update our civil rights protections, will you tell your Senators to vote ‘yes’ on the Equality Act when it comes up for a vote by adding your name to our petition now?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/pass-equality-act-now/?source=em20210402-1990&t=2&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/pass-equality-act-now/?source=em20210402-1990&t=3&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)**
**This monumental bill would update federal civil rights protections for LGBTQIA+ folks, AND update protections for all women and people of color in areas like transportation, retail spaces, and more.**
And it would stop bills like HB 1570 dead in their tracks. Studies have shown that children who are unable to access gender-affirming medical care experience higher rates of depression, anxiety, and suicide than trans youth with access to affirming care.
If passed, HB 1570 and other bills like it will continue to attempt to criminalize trans experiences and threaten the lives of LGBTQIA+ folks in our nation. It’s time to update our civil rights protections.
[Add your name now and urge your Senators to vote ‘yes’ on the Equality Act.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/pass-equality-act-now/?source=em20210402-1990&t=4&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210402-1990-footer&t=5&refcode2=1990_2526796_Sf-uld&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1990%2E2526796%2ESf-uld). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court Fails Americans on Clinton Emails
body:
Happy Easter!

[INSIDE JW]

MORE SHOCKING DETAILS OF FDA PURCHASES OF FETAL TISSUE -- AGENCY
WANTED “FRESH, SHIPPED ON WET ICE” FETAL ORGANS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22521&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9WZk5leEFvbTdqVT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==]

The sale of body parts harvested during abortions is not generally
understood, certainly not the gruesome details of the transactions.

More grotesque details emerge in 575 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22503&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLWZkYS1wcm9kLTMtMDA4NzYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDAyMjI1NTMx]
of
records we received from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA)
showing the agency spent tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars to buy
human fetal tissue from California-based Advanced Bioscience Resources
(ABR). The tissue was used in creating “humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==
to test “biologic drug products.”

This is the third set of records from our March 2019 lawsuit. We
released other sets, which also include records obtained from the
National Institutes of Health, in February 2020
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=17891&F=T&]
and June
2020
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=19379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmRhLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==].

ABR, a nonprofit, human fetal tissue “procurement” firm, has been
the subject of criminal referrals
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=17673&F=T&]
from
both U.S. House and Senate committees investigating human fetal tissue
trafficking and whether Planned Parenthood or any other entity was
illegally profiting from transfers of organs harvested from aborted
human fetuses. Federal law
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=17674&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzQyLzI4OWctMj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==]
regulates the
purchase and acceptance of human fetal tissue
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22504&F=T&]
for research. It is unlawful to “acquire, receive, or otherwise
transfer any human fetal tissue for valuable consideration if the
transfer affects interstate commerce
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22505&F=T&

The records include the following communications between ABR
procurement manager Perrin Larton and FDA research veterinary medical
official Dr. Kristina Howard between January 2011 and April 2018:

Howard’s May 10, 2012, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy01MTgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDAyMjI1NTMx]
to
Larton bearing the subject line “Tissue Delivery” details, “Just
wanted to follow up with you regarding the tissue deliveries. We have
three batches of mice that still need to be humanized, so please keep
us on the schedule every week until we manage to receive three sets of
tissue.”

Howard’s October 17, 2012 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22508&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZ3MtNDk0LTQ5NS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
to
Larton about the gender of an aborted fetus from which an organ was
harvested: “I wanted to check with your records on the sex of the
tissue we received today. It was Liver #4505.” Larton responded,
“The techs were not able to identify the gender. We only check
external genitalia and if it’s not there ... due to the nature of
the termination procedure... we have no way of telling.” Howard
replied, “Thank you for explaining that to me. I have some leftover
cells to sex it.”

A May 9, 2013 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22509&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZ3MtNDcwLTQ3Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
exchange
in which Howard complained to Larton about Fedex x-raying the packages
in which fetal organs had been shipped. Howard wrote, “Our package
was x-rayed and the tissues could not be used.” Larton responded,
“DAMN ... they were wonderful tissues. I procured them! I’m
training a new tech in Minneapolis and I told her how important it is
to put the DO NOT X-RAY stickers on the package. Of course if you
have an IMBECILE on the Fedex side ... but then, now it’s a moot
point.” Howard replied, “Yes, we were absolutely
heartbroken. They were beautiful tissues and to lose them like that
was awful.”

An August 26, 2015 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22510&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZ3MtMjQ4LTI1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
exchange
in which the FDA’s Howard wrote, “As always, we are requesting
liver and thymus for each date.” ABR’s Larton responds, “I’ll
put you on the schedule for your requested tissue delivery
dates.” Howard replies, “Thanks Perrin! Btw, are you planning to
attend the humanized mouse workshop in Zurich in January?” Larton
then writes, “Yes. Linda and I will both be attending. Will we see
you there?” Howard replies, “Assuming the gov’t allows me to
go, I will be there. I have lots of data!”

A June 9, 2016 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22511&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZ3MtMjQxLTI0Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
exchange
in which Howard tells Larton, “We have a very important and
timing-wise challenging, surgery the week of June 20th. We will be
making dual humanized BLT mice (human liver and the BLT surgery) at
the same time.” Larton replies, “Does the tissue HAVE to come
from a male fetus? It really helps when we can send either,
especially since this is an important and time sensitive
surgery.” Howard replied, “It is strongly preferred to have a
male fetus if at all possible. However, after we dose the mice, we
have to proceed with the surgery, so at that point undetermined sex or
female is better than no tissue. I know in some cases it is
impossible to tell what the sex is, however, I don’t know what
proportion of your tissues are in that category.”

A July 22, 2016 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22512&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy0xNjUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDAyMjI1NTMx]
in
which Howard asked Larton if she knew “about tissue for tomorrow
yet?” Larton replied, “This week I’m working with a doctor who
induces fetal demise at 20 weeks. The other doctors who staff this
clinic won’t induce fetal demise until 22 weeks ... and of course
... this week we had 4 21 week [sic] cases that all had been injected
with digoxin on Wednesday so the tissue is unusable. I’ll have you
on next week and prioritize your request.”

An August 5, 2016 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22513&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy0xNTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDAyMjI1NTMx]
from
an unidentified individual at ABR informing Howard that ABR was “not
able to procure for you today,” referring to human fetal
tissue. Howard replied, “Given how old the mice are (12 weeks) we
will use frozen tissue. Fresh tissue is always our preference, but I
don’t think we can wait another week. We are going to receive more
mice in early Sept so we will try for more tissue then. I hope supply
issues will resolve themselves by that time.” Larton, who was CCd
on the email, responded, “It’s so frustrating. We’re also
working with a new doctor in one of the busiest clinics... not a good
combo! The tissue is awful!”

A May 25, 2017 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22514&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy0zMzktMzQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==]
in
which Howard asked Larton “How likely is it that we could get tissue
tomorrow?” Larton responded, “Quite likely. I don’t know how
many cases will be available, but you’re the only researcher that
will take tissue this Saturday.” Howard replied, “Great news! We
have mice that need to be made.” Howard also thanks Perrin, “Btw,
last week’s tissue was amazing!”

A September 22, 2017 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22515&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy05MS05My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
in
which Lorton wrote to Howard: “We did get tissue for you today. Is
it to be addressed to you for pick up at the station?” Howard
responded, “Yay! Happy to hear tissue is available. By chance do
you know how many weeks it is?” Larton responded, “The tissue is
15 weeks. Due to the Rosh Hashanah holiday ... the clinics were
closed yesterday ... so no real large tissue today.” Howard
replied, “I didn’t realize that the holiday would interfere with
clinic operations. Thanks again for getting the tissue.” Larton
responded, “We didn’t either ... but ... many of the doctors are
Jewish!”

An April 5, 2018 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22516&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLXByb2QtMy0wMDg3Ni1wZy02Ni02Ny8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDIyMjU1MzE=]
in
which Howard wrote to Perrin, “[W]hile we (like everyone else) are
desperate for tissue each week, this week and especially next week are
important for us to get tissue. We are trying to get several new
staff qualified for our surgery (so they can participate in the other
scheduled surgeries) and we must have fresh tissue to do that. I
realize tissue is always hit or miss, but if it is possible to
prioritize us these two weeks, it would be greatly
appreciated.” Larton replied, “I just let everyone know to
prioritize your request today and if we don’t get it today,
tomorrow”

A June 18, 2018 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22517&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLWZkYS1wcm9kLTMtMDA4NzYtcGdzLTM0LTM2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==]
in
which the FDA’s Howard asked ABR’s Perrin to bill the FDA for
“four (4) sets of tissue for July, however, to ensure they are
covered on the existing PO [purchase order], can they all be billed
for July 6 – as we did last year as time was running
out?” Perrin replied, “I’m sure [name redacted] won’t have
a problem billing to the existing PO since you’ve done it in the
past.”

In September 2018, the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services
(HHS) terminated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22518&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGhzLmdvdi9hYm91dC9uZXdzLzIwMTkvMDYvMDUvc3RhdGVtZW50LWZyb20tdGhlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQtb2YtaGVhbHRoLWFuZC1odW1hbi1zZXJ2aWNlcy5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDAyMjI1NTMx]
the
contract with ABR. HHS said it “was not sufficiently assured that

The records were turned over to us as a result of our March 2019

(No.
1:19-cv-00876)).

Last month, the federal court overseeing this lawsuit ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53305&L=22382&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYWJvcnRlZC1mZXR1c2VzLWluZm9ybWF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQwMjIyNTUzMQ==]

The decision notes that ABR:

sold second-trimester livers and thymi for hundreds of dollars
apiece. The same for brains, eyes, and lungs. After tacking on fees
for services like shipping and cleaning, ABR could collect over $2,000
on a single fetus it purchased from Planned Parenthood for $60. The

These fetal organ trafficking documents shock the conscience and show
